entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SGE_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SGE_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0004.9290] Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Discontinued Operations with a value of -624,000 is not equal to the combined total of Net cash used in operating activities from discontinued operations, Net cash used in investing activities from discontinued operations and Net cash provided by financing activities from discontinued operations ( -2,139,000 + -283,000 + 1,930,000 ) with a value of -492,000.
These values should be equal. The properties of this us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations fact are: Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-06-30 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Discontinued Operations : -3 Decimals of Net cash used in operating activities from discontinued operations : -3 Decimals of Net cash used in investing activities from discontinued operations : -3 Decimals of Net cash provided by financing activities from discontinued operations : -3
Rule Element Id:9290 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SGE_instance_2024_2025.xml 4460

property.name: label
property.value: Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Discontinued Operations

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0004.9290] Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Discontinued Operations with a value of -165,000 is not equal to the combined total of Net cash used in operating activities from discontinued operations, Net cash used in investing activities from discontinued operations and Net cash provided by financing activities from discontinued operations ( -572,000 + -59,000 + 477,000 ) with a value of -154,000.
These values should be equal. The properties of this us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations fact are: Period :2024-01-01 to 2024-06-30 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Discontinued Operations : -3 Decimals of Net cash used in operating activities from discontinued operations : -3 Decimals of Net cash used in investing activities from discontinued operations : -3 Decimals of Net cash provided by financing activities from discontinued operations : -3
Rule Element Id:9290 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SGE_instance_2024_2025.xml 4422

property.name: label
property.value: Net Cash Provided by (Used in) Discontinued Operations
